prediction.reasoning: Based on WMT's historical volatility (~20% annualized), defensive consumer staples characteristics, and typical 21-day price movements. WMT tends to have lower volatility than broader market due to its stable business model. Point estimate assumes modest upward drift consistent with long-term equity returns. Confidence intervals calculated using geometric Brownian motion with estimated daily volatility of ~1.3%.
